messages.content:
Create a system for a a strategy game, this system will handle how to send the builders to construct buildings

* Its name will be BuilderManager
* When a building is created, it will call the builder manager and the building will be added to the queue
* When a Builder is created it will call the builder manager ant he will be marked as an available builder to be handled by the builder manager
* When there is a building pending to be build and there is a builder available it will call a corountine to wait a time and fill the health bar and the builder will be marked as busy
* When it is night time if the bulding is being constructed it is paused and the builder will go to his house
* The script knows if there is day or night with these subscriptions
            GameManager.Instance.OnDayStart += DayAction;
           GameManager.Instance.OnNightStart += NightAction;
* If a building is destroyed it will be marked as destroyed in a queue, the building will notify the builder   manager if this happens
* If it is day the manager will check if there are buildings destroyed, the builders will go out of its house and the builder manager will prioritize the buildings destroyed before the new ones
Complete the start construction method
Any builder can continue any building I dont need a specific builder to continue a specific building

Also I want you to handle these casse:

* The user can unassign a builder whenever he wants, I want you to remove a builder from the available builders, if that list is empty continue with the busy builders, if you remove a busy builder pause the activity he was doing and remove him
* Also I want you to check always if there are buldings to rebuild, if there are prioritize them if there are bulders available
Before starting the costruction the builder need to get to the building, when he is there then the constructions starts
No, the builder is a IA agent
I want you to create a method to pause the construction of a certain building
And how do I resume a paused building giving as parameters Builder builder, Building Base building, I suppose he have to stop the last coroutine and start a new one
Is it not better stop the corountine after realizing the cosntruction is pause, so you dont have to create the dictionary
